free_text: Spreadsheet-style attachment page (footer: "MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16"). Transposed grid: each COLUMN is one asset; rows are the bucket labels. Selections are indicated by solid BLACK-FILLED cells (convention confirmed on page 13 of this document, where fills vary by column). Blocks: Value of Asset (A: None ... L: Over $50,000,000, Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000); Type of Income (None/Dividends/Rent/Interest/Capital Gains/Excepted/Blind Trust/Tax-Deferred/Other Type of Income); Amount of Income: Current Year; Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016. Bucket labels carry letter prefixes ("A:", "B:", ...) which are stripped in `value`/amount fields. EIF row blank for all columns. All four assets on this page: black fill on the None row of every block; no other cells filled. "Page ___ of ___" left blank.
